# Extracao: transcription_pdf_05-Meta_Ads_Account_Checklist

- **Tipo:** TXT

---

Use this to get up and running on Meta. Skip any step already completed!
While logged in, go to business.facebook.com
Click Create Account (business account should be tied to your personal account)
Fill out the information in the ‘Create Account’ info and submit
Provide all possible business info (business email, phone, address, etc)
Verify your email address and go back to Business Manager
Go to Settings to finish configuration (gear icon on bottom on left)
From the Users (in menu on left) add any additional team members (optional)
From the Accounts (in menu on left) do the following:
Add your business page (Choose Page, then Add and search for name)
Optional: Add Instagram and Whatsapp accounts
From Brand Safety (in menu on left) click Domains and add your domain(s)
CREATE META BUSINESS ACCOUNT
Create from your Business Manager account at business.facebook.com
From the Accounts section click Ad Accounts, then Add, then Create New
Account
Create account name (business name is fine) time zone and
currency and click Next
Select “My business” and then click Create
Add people and set permissions (assign yourself Admin level access)
Add your company’s credit card details and tax information
CREATE META AD ACCOUNT
Grant Cardone Enterprises, Inc · chat@grantcardone.com · 800-368-5771 · GrantCardone.com

META AD ACCOUNT CHECKLIST
When Complete… Start Advertising!
NOTE: There are lots of additional options and settings,
these are the most important to get going
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
